note: Routes are mounted at root level (no /ai prefix) due to fastify-plugin unwrapping. PLATFORM_SERVICE_TOKEN not set — AI module in degraded mode (all services null → 503).

route_mapping.reason: fastify-plugin (fp) makes AI plugin non-encapsulated, routes escape prefix scope

environment_issues: PLATFORM_SERVICE_TOKEN not set in .env — AI module disabled (graceful degradation)
All service-dependent routes return HTTP 503 (Service Unavailable)
Validation-only routes (schema checking before service call) work correctly
